reviews.review_description: This game is a lot of fun! When you are in the game, you realize how much there is to offer and how immersive it is. The game has it all. PvP, PvE, missions, and a flying companion called K2B2. It is just a fun game to play with friends. It is easy to pick up and play anywhere. I am a huge fan of laser tag and Call of Duty Zombies. This game is the combination of the two. It is a fun game made by fun people who are actively engaged in the community Discord. I highly recommend this game.

Quantum Strike is a solid and surprisingly complete Mixed Reality experience, offering survival mode, mission-based gameplay, progression upgrades, and multiplayer — a rare and very welcome combination in MR right now.

A great surprise for MR lovers, the game showcases just how far Mixed Reality titles have come. Enemy variety keeps you on your toes: zombies that walk, crawl, and jump; floating heads; spiders — all with their own attack patterns and movement styles.

The atmosphere and story pull you in from the start, supported by strong execution and intuitive mechanics that make you want to push further, explore more, and constantly improve.

And the cherry on top? Multiplayer, making the whole experience even more engaging and replayable.

A must-try for anyone excited about the future of MR gaming.

reviews.review_title: Setting The Standard for Mixed Reality
reviews.review_description:
Quantum Strike is one of those games you hope turns out to be a fun and exciting Mixed Reality experience.....Then you play it, and you begin to lose yourself in the immersiveness of this Mixed Reality game. 

One thing that truly makes it stand out, besides Ai companion, graphics, gunplay, and gameplay, is the bHaptics integration. This was the first I've experience in a Mixed Reality game, and for them to give us even more depth to a Mixed Reality game, truly sets the standards for Mixed Reality gaming. 

Quantum Strike is a must have Mixed Reality game. Mrs. Kensei and I have found ourselves wanting to jump back in for more. Mainly for Mrs. Kensei to try to beat me in the Player Battle!
This game great but , please support k3d gun i will give 5 stars as soon as it is done
